戴頭盔先，因為我yr1 都講緊好多年前，都唔記得曬了
其實我頭先都講錯左俾你聽
你依家 scenario 係講緊agreement，咁招標就invitation to treat，之後返標，咁返標唔等於developer 一定要接受。其實去到返標呢個動作都只係invitation to treat。
因為依家developer 想bind 張contract，所以呢度又有返offer and acceptance。佢依家其實係俾返offer Au，俾3日時間佢（certain period of acceptance ）去accept offer
其實invitation of treat 可以包含埋offer and acceptance，但係invitation 既內容又會有唔同。而且我地讀既只係206，唔洗讀到咁深

求解
Responding to an invitation for tenders, Contractor Au submitted a bid to Developer Chan. Contractor Au then receives a letter stating: "Your tender accepted subject to the usual conditions. Our solicitors will prepare a written contract ready for your signature in three day's time." Contractor Au wants to withdraw his bid. Advise him.

紅字係一個acceptance定係算係counter offer?因為佢再加左個accept period?


我都戴定頭盔先，之前206都拎B+

i think the gist of the question shall be 'accepted subject to the usual conditions' which creates the client's counteroffer since the client may perhaps modify or add some terms and conditions
, or may even change or add obligations upon the contractor as implied by the wordings. Therefore, as long as the contractor withdraws his bid either by written or oral method, indicating that he is no longer willing to accept the conditions set by the client, such withdrawal shall not incur any legal implication

你睇睇本身個degree可唔可以行兩年條route考牌先
另外，竟然你話想考HKIS，姐係第4同5可以勾走。

UCEM master自學，不過快。

HKU MSC要 Degree CGPA高，有second up，2年畢業，只認QS。

PolyU speed 收生要求低D，不過要讀4年，但大機會HKIS GP/QS/BS 都認。

各有好處，不過既然有Degree底，試下攞個master都好既。

另外，竟然你話想考HKIS，姐係第4同5可以勾走。

UCEM master自學，不過快。

各有好處，不過既然有Degree底，試下攞個master都好既。

Increase Membership

The HKIS is preparing to expand its memb­ership base by invit­ing qualified profes­sionals and practiti­oners in the building and real estate in­dustries to become Affiliates. A forum was held on 24 May to outline the concept behind the Affiliate scheme. We will fi­rst consider surveyi­ng professionals from China who are unab­le to take part in our examination syste­m. This may create a good basis for a ne­twork of surveying professionals in China and facilitate par­tnering with the HKIS members practicing on the mainland. An EGM is scheduled for 20 June to amend the Constitution and By-laws. I strongly appeal to members to attend and vote as we need 100 members to constitute a quor­um.

Moreover, we will al­so explore and assess other possible mem­bership routes. We will look into cases where experienced pr­actitioners with qua­lifications equivale­nt to those held by our members were not previously able to obtain the HKIS memb­ership. The study sh­ould lead to proposa­ls being drafted for consultation later this year.

Assessor note 我問左朋友（ 係某Consultant )
佢俾晒d part 2 既assessor note 話 part 1 measurement 佢公司無渦 sosad

sfbc明已經好好 下一步就係鑽研唔同clause既關係
measurement好難掂晒咁多個trade，做consultants都未必有機會
唯有自己睇熟smm同pastpaper, 同同學仔/同事研究下, 至少有啲基本既要知, 石矢板鐵既板都有好多野可以慢慢睇


有時睇smm, 之前 我讀果間U 出名 唔教measurement,
頭先睇一睇, 計pile 果 個M 都睇唔明呀so9sad .
(Measure the area in plane (not developed) elevation along the centre line of steel sheet piles)
做左2年, 都未試過有機會做piling 果d, 一收地盤 就係form 好晒既

developed elevation即係拉直後既elevation
幻想下sheet pile好似folding doot咁有得拉直就會明
